subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I testify that Thy proof hath vanquished all former proofs, and Thy testimony hath appeared with justice, and Thy signs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اشهد ان حجتک غلبت حجج القبل و برهانک ظهر بالعدل و آیاتک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
